UNION ALL SELECT '01300001506' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001504' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001505' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001494' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001501' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001508' UNION ALL '01300001514' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001513' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001518' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001516' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001503' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001507' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001498' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001511' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001495' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001502' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001500' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001512' UNION ALL SELECT '01300001517'
), completed_e AS (
  SELECT st.productId, st.id AS taskId, st.completedAt, st.metadata,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY st.productId ORDER BY st.completedAt DESC, st.id DESC) AS rn
  FROM station_tasks st
  WHERE st.stationCode = 'E' AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
)
SELECT
  LEFT(tb.batchNo, 3) AS prefix,
  COALESCE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ce.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')), 'NO_E_TASK') AS ePhotoSyncStatus,
  COUNT(*) AS batchCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ce.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withFrontUrl,
  SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ce.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS withBackUrl
FROM target_batches tb
LEFT JOIN products p ON p.batchNo = tb.batchNo
LEFT JOIN completed_e ce ON ce.productId = p.id AND ce.rn = 1
GROUP BY LEFT(tb.batchNo, 3), COALESCE(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(ce.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')), 'NO_E_TASK')
ORDER BY prefix, ePhotoSyncStatus;
